title: Ubiquiti UniFi U6 Mesh Pro, U6-Mesh-Pro
category: Ubiquiti UniFi U6 Mesh Pro, U6-Mesh-Pro
description: Ubiquiti 6 Mesh Pro is an outdoor high performance access point. To connect the device to the network, there are 2x LAN ports with a speed of 1 Gb/s, one of which is intended for connection and the other for expanding the network. The access point transmits in the 2.4 GHz band with a speed of 574 Mb/s and in the 5 GHz band with a speed of up to 2.4 Gb/s . The access point can be powered using a PoE switch or a 48 V adapter, which is included in the package. High resistance to adverse conditions… To manage the device, you need to download the original software called UniFi Network from the official website, thanks to which the entire network can be controlled. The indisputable advantage of UniFi Controller is that it is completely free without any restrictions! This central management will allow you to upload maps and set basic parameters as well as advanced functions, such as SSID, guest account, start page, traffic statistics and the list and status of associated clients, always… Guest network Load balancing - maintaining an even load / switching clients Speed limiting for each SSID Clear network monitoring Device Pole mount, wall mount Gigabit PoE power adapter 48V / 0.32A Screws
specsSearch: Wireless features Wireless frequency 2.4 + 5 GHz (dual band) WiFi standards 802.11n, 802.11a, 802.11ac, 802.11b/g, 802.11ax MU-MIMO Yes Transmission speed - 5GHz [Mb/s] 2402 Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 574 Tx power 2.4GHz [dBm] 22 Tx power 5GHz [dBm] 27 Security WPA-PSK, WPA-Enterprise (WPA/WPA2/WPA3) 2.4GHz MIMO 2 x 2 5GHz MIMO 2 x 2 Type of antenna Built-in Fixed antennas 8 Antenna gain [dBi] 8 Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (2) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Power Power over Ethernet 802.3af, 43 .. 57V DC Max. power consumption [W] 9 Physical characteristics Purpose Outdoor Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 30 up to 60 Weight [g] 819 Width [mm] 181 Height [mm] 342 Depth [mm] 60
